name: Creamy Noodles & Beef Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles to desired doneness; drain.
2. Brown ground beef; drain.
3. Simmer ground beef, onion, salt, pepper and tomato sauce together.
4. Cream the cream cheese, cottage cheese and sour cream together.
5. Add chopped green onions to the cream mixture.
6. Pour the cream mixture over the noodles.
7. Layer the noodles and ground beef mixture in a casserole dish.
8. Top with grated Parmesan cheese.
9. Bake at 350°F for 30-40 minutes.
